name: Crab and Cream Cheese Hors D'oeuvre
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except almonds in a bowl.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture to a shallow baking dish.
4. Sprinkle chopped almonds evenly over the top of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until the top is slightly browned.
6. Serve hot on crackers.
Makes 2 cups.
